primary_sources.notes: IRDAI aggregate industry data: expense of management ratio, combined ratio, loss ratio, commission ratios for general insurers in India.

primary_sources.source_name: ICICI Lombard General Insurance FY25 Annual Report (BSE: 540716)
primary_sources.notes: Net earned premium ~₹17,000 Cr, combined ratio 104.3%, expense ratio 27.5%, loss ratio 76.8%.

primary_sources.source_name: Bajaj Allianz General Insurance FY25 (unlisted — BRSR disclosure)
primary_sources.notes: Combined ratio and expense structure from BRSR filing.

primary_sources.source_name: New India Assurance FY25 Annual Report (BSE: 540769)
primary_sources.notes: Public sector insurer. Expense of management ratio per IRDAI Form. Operating expense ratio ~28-30%.

primary_sources.source_name: Star Health & Allied Insurance FY25 Annual Report (BSE: 543412)
primary_sources.notes: Standalone health insurer. Expense ratio ~37% including high sales commissions for retail health.

source_metadata.methodology: Categories expressed as % of gross written premium (GWP) — standard insurance sector convention. IRDAI mandates expense-of-management reporting, making industry data highly standardised. P25/P50/P75 derived from 5 general insurers (FY25 disclosures) plus IRDAI aggregate. P90 reflects PSU insurers and underperforming private players.

HR.source_note: Staff costs as % of gross written premium. IRDAI mandates expense-of-management disclosure. ICICI Lombard FY25: employee cost ~9% of GWP, New India ~15%, PSU players 18-22%.

MARKETING.source_note: Commission + marketing as % of GWP. IRDAI FY24 aggregate: average commission ratio 11-15%. Retail health (Star Health): ~20% commission. Commercial lines: 8-12%.

IT.source_note: Technology spend. Gartner FS Benchmark 2024: insurance IT spend 3-5% of premium. Insurtech-adjacent players 5-8%. Legacy PSU players 7-9% (inefficient, on-premise).

OUTSOURCED.source_note: Outsourced claims processing, surveyor fees, KYC. ICICI Lombard: third-party administrator and surveyor costs ~3% of GWP.

FACILITIES.source_note: Branch network and office costs. IRDAI: general insurers shifting to direct digital channel; branch cost share declining. PSU players with legacy branch networks higher.

PROF_SVCS.source_note: Actuarial, legal, reinsurance advisory, audit. IRDAI: mandatory appointed actuary fees + external audit included in expense-of-management ratio.

INSURANCE.source_note: Reinsurance admin costs net of premium (operational cost of reinsurance contracts, not claims). INTERNAL_CALIBRATION.

TRAVEL.source_note: Sales staff travel and agent support. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — estimated from IRDAI expense-of-management sub-heads.
